---
title: 'Immediate Withdrawal.'
date: '2012-01-23T07:09:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5900528693958507440'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/immediate-withdrawal.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Random'
  - 'study'
---

Storehouse of BLESSING...<br /><br />Make a withdrawal...<br /><br />Jesus never waited, ever, for a manifestation... ALL his miracles were&nbsp;Suddenlies... even those that he sent to wash in a pool, or show themselves to the priests, received in their action. ONLY case of delayed response was the fig tree... but I sense something else was going on there...<br /><br />I don't know what this means, but my wife is a&nbsp;genius... and far more in tune with the Spirit of God than I am on most days...<br /><br />Pray this over... DW
